source_note: Current California Legislative Information code-section pages include the latest history parenthetical. Historical versions use official Assembly Chief Clerk originals preserved as SFSC GitHub Release assets. When the current version start date is after a case filing date and no historical original is mapped, import/viewer code keeps the citation but does not present the current page as the filing-date statute.

historical_versions.history: Amended by Stats. 1973, Ch. 1078, Sec. 3, p. 2172. Effective October 1, 1973.
historical_versions.source_label: California Assembly Chief Clerk, Statutes and Amendments to the Codes 1973, Regular Session, Ch. 1078, Sec. 3, p. 2172

HS 11351.history: Amended by Stats. 2011, Ch. 15, Sec. 152. (AB 109) Effective April 4, 2011. Operative October 1, 2011, by Sec. 636 of Ch. 15, as amended by Stats. 2011, Ch. 39, Sec. 68.
